case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. VICTOR PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
